name: sales-coach
description: Automated weekly sales coaching system for SRED.ca. Pulls activity data from Fireflies, HubSpot, HeyReach, and Gmail, prepares a pre-session brief for the VAPI coaching call with Evan, then auto-generates post-session reports (Evan's Coaching Report + Jude's Manager Summary) and updates the living Evan profile. Includes escalation nudges if the coaching call is missed.
